title: Death Chest
description: Simple forge server side gravestone mod.
body:
A simple server side death chest mod. For Forge.

 

Works on both server side and client side.

 

Uses only vanilla chests so that it doesn't need to be installed by the client.

 

Features in 1.4 (Can be changed in config files):

Player Heads spawn on top of the chests (off by default).

Players get a log book that shows time of death dimension and coordinates (on by default).

Chests are locked and can only be opened by players with the right log book (on by default).
